LanguageData.WNA_Message_ColonistTurned: Our people is enthralled by Permaconst Command！
LanguageData.WNA_LordHostility: We are hostile with Whelingnorther Alliance
LanguageData.WNA_LordNeutralized: We are not hostile with Whelingnorther Alliance
LanguageData.WNA_Letter_Permaconst_Desc: A series of mysterious phantom signals emanated from deep space, echoing across the planet via hidden relay stations scattered throughout this rimworld. \n\nWhelingnorther Alliance's Permaconst Command has initiated another self-maintenance cycle, and its thralls will once again begin their hunt. Direct confrontation is never a good idea; entrusting the enemy to reliable turret defenses is the best course of action.
